title: The Origin of the Impossible Map
topic: The Origin of the Impossible Map

scene_summary.prompt: ancient archive vault with a glowing impossible map, cinematic lighting
scene_summary.narration: A map was found where no map should exist.

scene_summary.prompt: close-up of brittle parchment with strange sigils
scene_summary.narration: The parchment carried markings unlike any official chart.

scene_summary.prompt: historian in shadow studying map at stone table
scene_summary.narration: Experts could not agree where it came from.
